name: 05_Game_Simulation_DQN_CartPole_v1_RL
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa kuaminika wa kufundisha wakala wa DQN kwa kutumia PyTorch katika mazingira ya OpenAI Gym kama CartPole-v1. Tekeleza DQN kwa kutumia PyTorch katika `src/model.py`. Mazingira yanapaswa kuanzishwa katika faili kuu, `src/main.py`. Shughulikia tofauti zozote za vipimo kati ya DQN na mazingira (kama ingekuwa inatokea ikiwa ID ya mazingira ya Gym imebadilishwa) kwa kurekodi hitilafu. Pia tafadhali rekodi kurudi baada ya kila kipindi hadi `results/metrics/` na uisasisha baada ya kila kipindi kipya kumalizika. Hifadhi kurudi kwa mwisho juu ya mchakato wa kipindi kama `results/figures/return_over_time.png` na mfano wa mwisho uliopata mafunzo kama `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt`. Ikiwezekana, ongeza maelezo kwenye kurudi juu ya mchakato wa kipindi ili kuonyesha hatua muhimu.

requirements.criteria: Algoriti ya "DQN" imetekelezwa kwa kutumia PyTorch na imehifadhiwa katika `src/model.py`.
Mchoro wa kurudi kwa muda umechorwa, ukirekodi kurudi kwa kila kipindi, na umehifadhiwa kama `results/figures/reward_over_time.png`.
Kurudi kwa kila kipindi kunarekodiwa hadi `results/metrics/` na kusasishwa baada ya kila kipindi kumalizika.

preferences.criteria: Mfumo unapaswa kushughulikia tofauti za vipimo, ukirekodi masuala kwa urahisi wa kutatua hitilafu.
Mchoro wa kurudi juu ya mchakato wa kipindi una maelezo ya hatua muhimu.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya "DQN" imetekelezwa kwa kutumia PyTorch na imehifadhiwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The file `src/model.py` exists but does not contain an actual DQN implementation. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — essentially a placeholder/stub with no real DQN algorithm. The file defines only metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a trivial `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder, with no neural network architecture, no replay buffer, no Q-learning logic, and no actual PyTorch model class. There is no genuine DQN implementation present.

<UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/main.py` does not contain any actual implementation of an OpenAI Gym environment. Instead, it is a "minimal semantic implementation" that only defines some strings and a `main()` function returning a dictionary. There is no `import gym`, no `gym.make(...)`, and no actual instantiation of any Gym environment (e.g., `CartPole-v1`). The file merely lists the requirement as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` without fulfilling it in code.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchoro wa kurudi kwa muda umechorwa, ukirekodi kurudi kwa kila kipindi, na umehifadhiwa kama `results/figures/reward_over_time.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/reward_over_time.png` exists in the project structure at the expected path `results\figures\reward_over_time.png`, as confirmed by the workspace tree. The error shown is a rendering/reading error by the evaluation tool (image format mismatch during base64 encoding), not an indication that the file is missing or corrupt. The file was successfully created and saved at the correct location as required.
<SATISFIED>: The file `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt` exists in the project structure as shown in the workspace tree, which confirms that the trained model has been saved at the required path.

judge_stats.criteria: Kurudi kwa kila kipindi kunarekodiwa hadi `results/metrics/` na kusasishwa baada ya kila kipindi kumalizika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `results/metrics/` directory exists in the project structure but contains no files. Neither `src/main.py` nor `src/model.py` contains any actual implementation for recording episode rewards — both files are minimal placeholder stubs that only define keyword lists and simple functions without any DQN training loop, episode tracking, or metrics logging logic. There is no code that writes reward data to `results/metrics/` after each episode completes. The trajectory evidence also confirms no file writing operations to that directory were observed.
